text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It cannot be... This is a nightmare...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hah... Look at me, turning my back on reality.
Pathetic and weak-willed...
choice_data_list: You can do better. I know you can!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Do I truly seem so rash?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Then again, you may be right. If I rush ahead too
eagerly, I'll only trip over my own feet. I must first
accept my own inadequacies.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It seems I must chart a new path to my throne.
Will you help me, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf and I spend some time talking
over our future plans.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So you still believe in me... even after this
shameful display.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But you're right, of course. This is not where my
story ends. It can't be!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My legacy has only just begun!
